characters: Elder
A respected voice of experience who remembers the old ways.
Sage
A keeper of ancient knowledge and forgotten lore.
Bard
A wandering performer who carries news and stories between towns.
Scribe
A careful writer who preserves words for future generations.
Tinker
A traveling repair-worker who fixes anything for a price.
Tailor
A needle-wielding craftsperson who shapes cloth into garments.
Toymaker
A whimsical builder who creates playthings from wood and paint.
Wanderer
A rootless traveler who belongs nowhere and everywhere.
Apprentice
A young learner bound to a master, eager and clumsy.
Jester
A quick-witted fool who speaks truth disguised as comedy.
Goldsmith
A precise artisan who works precious metal into beauty.
Glassblower
A heat-resistant artist who shapes molten glass into form.
Vintner
A grape-growing winemaker with purple-stained hands.
Mason
A stone-cutting builder who raises walls that last centuries.
Chandler
A candle-maker whose workshop smells of beeswax and tallow.
Cartographer
A map-drawing explorer who charts the unknown.
Architect
A visionary builder who designs structures that inspire.
Furrier
A skilled worker who transforms animal pelts into fine garments.
Acrobat
A flexible performer who defies gravity with leaps and tumbles.
Puppeteer
A string-pulling artist who brings carved figures to life.
